This document provides working archive URLs, hosting platforms, and directory structures for each candidate model.\n6\t\n7\t**Research Date:** 2026-07-03\n8\t\n9\t---\n10\t\n11\t## Candidate Models Overview\n12\t\n13\t### Primary Models (Verified DRT=3 Usage)\n14\t1. **HRRR** (High-Resolution Rapid Refresh)\n15\t2. **NAM CONUS** (North American Mesoscale)\n16\t3. **NDFD/NBM** (National Digital Forecast Database / National Blend of Models)\n17\t\n18\t### Additional Models (Documented Complex Packing)\n19\t4. **RAP** (Rapid Refresh)\n20\t5. **RRFS** (Rapid Refresh Forecast System)\n21\t\n22\t### Additional Regional Models (Lambert Conformal, DRT Unknown)\n23\t6. **HREF** (High-Resolution Ensemble Forecast)\n24\t7. **SREF** (Short Range Ensemble Forecast)\n25\t8. **RTMA/URMA** (Real-Time/Unrestricted Mesoscale Analysis)\n26\t9. **HiResW** (High-Resolution Window)\n27\t10. **WAVEWATCH3** (Great Lakes Wave Model)\n28\t\n29\t---\n30\t\n31\t## 1. HRRR (High-Resolution Rapid Refresh)\n32\t\n33\t### Primary Archive: AWS Open Data Registry\n34\t\n35\t**Base URL:** `https://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n36\t\n37\t**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-hrrr-pds/`\n38\t\n39\t**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n40\t\n41\t**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n42\t\n43\t**Directory Structure:**\n44\t```\n45\thttps://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD/HH/fFF/\n46\t```\n47\t\n48\tWhere:\n49\t- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date (e.g., `20260703`)\n50\t- **HH** = Cycle hour (00-23, hourly)\n51\t- **fFF** = Forecast hour (00-18 standard, 00-48 extended)\n52\t\n53\t**File Naming Convention:**\n54\t- Surface fields: `hrrr.tCCz.wrfsfcfFF.grib2`\n55\t- Pressure fields: `hrrr.tCCz.wrfprsfFF.grib2`\n56\t- Native fields: `hrrr.tCCz.wrfnatfFF.grib2`\n57\t- Sub-hourly: `hrrr.tCCz.wrfsubhfFF.MM.grib2`\n58\t\n59\tWhere CC = cycle hour (00-23), FF = forecast hour (00-48)\n60\t\n61\t**Example URLs:**\n62\t```\n63\thttps://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/00/f00/hrrr.t00z.wrfsfcf00.grib2\n64\thttps://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/06/f12/hrrr.t06z.wrfsfcf12.grib2\n65\thttps://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/00/f01/hrrr.t00z.wrfsubhf01.15.grib2\n66\t```\n67\t\n68\t**Alternative Archives:**\n69\t- **NOMADS:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/hrrr/prod/`\n70\t- **University of Utah CHPC:** `https://home.chpc.utah.edu/~u0553130/Brian_Blaylock/cgi-bin/hrrr_download.cgi`\n71\t- **NCEP Products:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/hrrr/`\n72\t\n73\t**Model Specifications:**\n74\t- Resolution: 3 km (Grid #184)\n75\t- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n76\t- Central Latitude: 38.5°N\n77\t- Central Longitude: 97.5°W (262.5°W)\n78\t- Update Frequency: Hourly (00z-23z)\n79\t- Forecast Hours: 0-18h (standard), 0-48h (extended: 00,06,12,18z)\n80\t- DRT=3 Status: ✅ VERIFIED (~82-100% of messages use complex packing)\n81\t\n82\t**Sources:**\n83\t- [NOAA HRRR Official Page](https://rapidrefresh.noaa.gov/hrrr/)\n84\t- [AWS HRRR Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-hrrr-pds/)\n85\t- [NCEP HRRR Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/hrrr/)\n86\t\n87\t---\n88\t\n89\t## 2. NOAA Open Data Program\n98\t\n99\t**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n100\t\n101\t**Directory Structure:**\n102\t```\n103\thttps://noaa-nam-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD_HH/\n104\t```\n105\t\n106\tWhere:\n107\t- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date (e.g., `20260703`)\n108\t- **HH** = Cycle hour (00, 06, 12, 18)\n109\t\n110\t**File Naming Convention:**\n111\t- AWIP physics: `nam.tCCz.awphys00.tm00.grib2`\n112\t- CONUS nest: `nam.tCCz.conusnest.hiresffh.tm00.grib2`\n113\t\n114\tWhere CC = cycle hour (00, 06, 12, 18), ffh = forecast hour (00-60)\n115\t\n116\t**Example URLs:**\n117\t```\n118\thttps://noaa-nam-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703_00/nam.t00z.awphys00.tm00.grib2\n119\thttps://noaa-nam-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703_12/nam.t12z.awphys12.tm00.grib2\n120\t```\n121\t\n122\t**Alternative Archives:**\n123\t- **NOMADS:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/nam/prod/`\n124\t- **READY Archives:** `https://www.ready.noaa.gov/archives.php`\n125\t- **NCEP Products:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/nam/`\n126\t\n127\t**Model Specifications:**\n128\t- Resolution: 12 km (Grid #218 - primary)\n129\t- Alternative Grids: Grid #197 (5 km), Grid #184 (2.5 km), Grid #91 (3 km AK)\n130\t- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n131\t- Update Frequency: 4x daily (00, 06, 12, 18z)\n132\t- Forecast Hours: 0-60 hours\n133\t- Products: awphys (AWIP physics), multiple regional grids\n134\t- DRT=3 Status: ✅ VERIFIED (100% of awphys messages use complex packing)\n135\t\n136\t**Sources:**\n137\t- [AWS NAM Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-nam/)\n138\t- [READY NAM Documentation](https://www.ready.noaa.gov/READYmetdata.php)\n139\t- [NCEP NAM Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/nam/)\n140\t\n141\t---\n142\t\n143\t## 3. NDFD / NBM (National Digital Forecast Database / National Blend of Models)\n144\t\n145\t### Primary Archive: NOAA FTP/HTTP Server\n146\t\n147\t**FTP URL:** `ftp://tgftp.nws.noaa.gov/SL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/`\n148\t\n149\t**HTTP URL:** `https://tgftp.nws.noaa.gov/SL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/`\n150\t\n151\t**Hosting Platform:** NOAA FTP Server (tgftp.nws.noaa.gov)\n152\t\n153\t**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (anonymous FTP, no authentication required)\n154\t\n155\t**Directory Structure Path Components:**\n156\t```\n157\tSL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/\n158\t```\n159\t\n160\tWhere:\n161\t- **SL.us008001** = Station/location identifier\n162\t- **ST.opnl** = Open/operational status\n163\t- **DF.gr2** = Data format (GRIB2)\n164\t- **DC.ndfd** = Data content (NDFD)\n165\t\n166\t**Example URLs:**\n167\t```\n168\thttps://tgftp.nws.noaa.gov/SL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/CONUS/\n169\thttps://tgftp.nws.noaa.gov/SL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/PRICO/\n170\t```\n171\t\n172\t### Alternative Archive: AWS Open Data Registry (NBM)\n173\t\n174\t**Base URL:** `https://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n175\t\n176\t**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds/`\n177\t\n178\t**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n179\t\n180\t**Directory Structure:**\n181\t```\n182\thttps://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/blend.YYYYMMDD/HH/core/\n183\t```\n184\t\n185\tWhere:\n186\t- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date\n187\t- **HH** = Cycle hour (00, 06, 12, 18)\n188\t\n189\t**File Naming Convention:**\n190\t```\n191\tblend.tHHz.core.fFFF.co.grib2\n192\t```\n193\t\n194\tWhere HH = cycle hour, FFF = forecast hour (001, 002, etc.)\n195\t\n196\t**Example URLs:**\n197\t```\n198\thttps://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/blend.20260703/00/core/blend.t00z.core.f001.co.grib2\n199\thttps://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/blend.20260703/12/core/blend.t12z.core.f012.co.grib2\n200\t```\n201\t\n202\t**Model Specifications:**\n203\t- Resolution: 2.5 km (CONUS - Grid #184), 5 km (Grid #197), 3 km (various)\n204\t- Coverage: CONUS, Puerto Rico, Hawaii, Guam, Alaska\n205\t- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n206\t- Update Frequency: Multiple daily updates\n207\t- DRT=3 Status: ✅ DOCUMENTED (explicitly states use of complex packing DRT 5.2/5.3)\n208\t\n209\t**Sources:**\n210\t- [NDFD GRIB2 Design](https://graphical.weather.gov/docs/grib_design.html)\n211\t- [NBM v4.0 Documentation](https://vlab.noaa.gov/web/mdl/nbm-grib2-v4.0)\n212\t- [AWS NBM Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-nbm/)\n213\t\n214\t---\n215\t\n216\t## 4. RAP (Rapid Refresh)\n217\t\n218\t### Primary Archive: AWS Open Data Registry\n219\t\n220\t**Base URL:** `https://noaa-rap-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n221\t\n222\t**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-rap-pds/`\n223\t\n224\t**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n225\t\n226\t**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n227\t\n228\t**Directory Structure:**\n229\t```\n230\thttps://noaa-rap-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD/HH/\n231\t```\n232\t\n233\tWhere:\n234\t- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date (e.g., `20260703`)\n235\t- **HH** = Cycle hour (00-23, hourly)\n236\t\n237\t**File Naming Convention:**\n238\t- 13km pressure levels: `rap.tCCz.awp130pgrbfxx.grib2`\n239\t- 20km pressure levels: `rap.tCCz.awp252pgrbfxx.grib2`\n240\t- 40km pressure levels: `rap.tCCz.awp236pgrbfxx.grib2`\n241\t\n242\tWhere CC = cycle hour (00-23), xx = forecast hour\n243\t\n244\t**Example URLs:**\n245\t```\n246\thttps://noaa-rap-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/00/rap.t00z.awp130pgrbf00.grib2\n247\thttps://noaa-rap-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/12/rap.t12z.awp130pgrbf12.grib2\n248\t```\n249\t\n250\t**Alternative Archives:**\n251\t- **NOMADS:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/rap/prod/`\n252\t- **NCEP Products:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/rap/`\n253\t\n254\t**Model Specifications:**\n255\t- Resolution: 13 km (Grid #130 - primary)\n256\t- Alternative Grids: Grid #236 (40 km), Grid #200 (Puerto Rico 16 km)\n257\t- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n258\t- Update Frequency: Hourly (00z-23z)\n259\t- Forecast Hours: 0-21h (standard), 0-51h (extended: 03,09,15,21z)\n260\t- DRT=3 Status: LIKELY (documented complex packing, requires file verification)\n261\t\n262\t**Sources:**\n263\t- [AWS RAP Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-rap/)\n264\t- [NCEP RAP Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/rap/)\n265\t- [Herbie RAP Documentation](https://herbie.readthedocs.io/)\n266\t\n267\t---\n268\t\n269\t## 5. RRFS (Rapid Refresh Forecast System)\n270\t\n271\t### Primary Archive: AWS Open Data Registry\n272\t\n273\t**Base URL:** `https://noaa-rrfs-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n274\t\n275\t**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-rrfs-pds/`\n276\t\n277\t**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n278\t\n279\t**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n280\t\n281\t**Status:** BETA/Prototype (scheduled operational ~August 2026)\n282\t\n283\t**Directory Structure:**\n284\t```\n285\thttps://noaa-rrfs-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD/HH/\n286\t```\n287\t\n288\tWhere:\n289\t- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date (e.g., `20260703`)\n290\t- **HH** = Cycle hour (00-23, hourly)\n291\t\n292\t**Example URLs:**\n293\t```\n294\thttps://noaa-rrfs-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/00/\n295\thttps://noaa-rrfs-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/06/\n296\t```\n297\t\n298\t**Alternative Archives:**\n299\t- **NOMADS:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/rrfs/prod/` (Available July 2026 onwards)\n300\t- **GribStream:** `https://gribstream.com/models/rrfsprslev`\n301\t\n302\t**Model Specifications:**\n303\t- Resolution: 3 km (1799 x 1059 grid)\n304\t- Coverage: CONUS\n305\t- Projection: Lambert Conformal CONUS\n306\t- Update Frequency: Hourly: 0-18h; Extended (00,06,12,18z): 0-84h\n307\t- Status: Next-generation model to replace NAM, HiResW, HREF, NARRE\n308\t- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (model in development, not yet verified)\n309\t\n310\t**Sources:**\n311\t- [NOAA GSL RRFS Page](https://gsl.noaa.gov/rrfs/)\n312\t- [AWS RRFS Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-rrfs/)\n313\t- [NCEP RRFS Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/rrfs/)\n314\t\n315\t---\n316\t\n317\t## 6. HREF (High-Resolution Ensemble Forecast)\n318\t\n319\t### Primary Archive: NOMADS\n320\t\n321\t**Base URL:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/`\n322\t\n323\t**Hosting Platform:** NOMADS (NOAA Operational Model Archive and Distribution System)\n324\t\n325\t**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n326\t\n327\t**Access Methods:**\n328\t- HTTPS direct download\n329\t- THREDDS Data Server\n330\t- OPeNDAP protocol\n331\t- GRIB filter for data subsetting\n332\t\n333\t**Directory Structure (NOMADS):**\n334\t```\n335\thttps://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/href/prod/href.YYYYMMDD/HH/\n336\t```\n337\t\n338\tWhere:\n339\t- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date\n340\t- **HH** = Cycle hour (typically 00, 06, 12, 18 for ensemble runs)\n341\t\n342\t**Alternative Resources:**\n343\t- **SPC HREF Viewer:** `https://www.spc.noaa.gov/exper/href/`\n344\t- **Herbie Documentation:** `https://herbie.readthedocs.io/en/stable/gallery/noaa_models/href.html`\n345\t\n346\t**Model Specifications:**\n347\t- Resolution: 5 km (approximately)\n348\t- Coverage: CONUS, Alaska, Hawaii\n349\t- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30 - assumed for regional ensemble)\n350\t- Update Frequency: 2x daily (approximately)\n351\t- Status: Convection-allowing model (CAM) ensemble\n352\t- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (requires file verification)\n353\t\n354\t**Sources:**\n355\t- [SPC HREF Ensemble Viewer](https://www.spc.noaa.gov/exper/href/)\n356\t- [Herbie HREF Documentation](https://herbie.readthedocs.io/en/stable/gallery/noaa_models/href.html)\n357\t\n358\t---\n359\t\n360\t## 7. SREF (Short Range Ensemble Forecast)\n361\t\n362\t### Primary Archive: NOMADS\n363\t\n364\t**Base URL:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/`\n365\t\n366\t**Hosting Platform:** NOMADS (NOAA Operational Model Archive and Distribution System)\n367\t\n368\t**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n369\t\n370\t**Directory Structure (NOMADS):**\n371\t```\n372\thttps://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/sref/prod/sref.YYYYMMDD/HH/\n373\t```\n374\t\n375\tWhere:\n376\t- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date\n377\t- **HH** = Cycle hour (03, 09, 15, 21 - 4x daily)\n378\t\n379\t**Alternative Resources:**\n380\t- **NCEP SREF Products:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/sref/`\n381\t\n382\t**Important Status Notice:**\n383\t⚠️ **As of July 25, 2025, NOAA/NWS has issued a proposal to terminate the SREF system, with GEFS (Global Ensemble Forecast System) suggested as the replacement. This may affect future data availability.**\n384\t\n385\t**Model Specifications:**\n386\t- Resolution: 32-45 km (regional)\n387\t- Coverage: CONUS, Alaska\n388\t- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30 - assumed)\n389\t- Update Frequency: 4x daily (03, 09, 15, 21z)\n390\t- Ensemble Size: 21 members covering North America (US, Canada, Mexico, Eastern Pacific, Western Atlantic)\n391\t- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (requires file verification)\n392\t\n393\t**Sources:**\n394\t- [NOMADS Portal](https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/)\n395\t- [NCEP SREF Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/sref/)\n396\t\n397\t---\n398\t\n399\t## 8. GDT 3.30 Candidate Model Archive URLs\n\n## Summary\n\nComprehensive archive URL documentation for all NOAA models identified in bead bf-1wwi as using Grid Definition Template 3.30 (Lambert Conformal Conic projection). This document provides working archive URLs, hosting platforms, and directory structures for each candidate model.\n\n**Research Date:** 2026-07-03\n\n---\n\n## Candidate Models Overview\n\n### Primary Models (Verified DRT=3 Usage)\n1. **HRRR** (High-Resolution Rapid Refresh)\n2. **NAM CONUS** (North American Mesoscale)\n3. **NDFD/NBM** (National Digital Forecast Database / National Blend of Models)\n\n### Additional Models (Documented Complex Packing)\n4. **RAP** (Rapid Refresh)\n5. **RRFS** (Rapid Refresh Forecast System)\n\n### Additional Regional Models (Lambert Conformal, DRT Unknown)\n6. **HREF** (High-Resolution Ensemble Forecast)\n7. **SREF** (Short Range Ensemble Forecast)\n8. **RTMA/URMA** (Real-Time/Unrestricted Mesoscale Analysis)\n9. **HiResW** (High-Resolution Window)\n10. **WAVEWATCH3** (Great Lakes Wave Model)\n\n---\n\n## 1. HRRR (High-Resolution Rapid Refresh)\n\n### Primary Archive: AWS Open Data Registry\n\n**Base URL:** `https://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n\n**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-hrrr-pds/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n\n**Directory Structure:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD/HH/fFF/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date (e.g., `20260703`)\n- **HH** = Cycle hour (00-23, hourly)\n- **fFF** = Forecast hour (00-18 standard, 00-48 extended)\n\n**File Naming Convention:**\n- Surface fields: `hrrr.tCCz.wrfsfcfFF.grib2`\n- Pressure fields: `hrrr.tCCz.wrfprsfFF.grib2`\n- Native fields: `hrrr.tCCz.wrfnatfFF.grib2`\n- Sub-hourly: `hrrr.tCCz.wrfsubhfFF.MM.grib2`\n\nWhere CC = cycle hour (00-23), FF = forecast hour (00-48)\n\n**Example URLs:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/00/f00/hrrr.t00z.wrfsfcf00.grib2\nhttps://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/06/f12/hrrr.t06z.wrfsfcf12.grib2\nhttps://noaa-hrrr-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/00/f01/hrrr.t00z.wrfsubhf01.15.grib2\n```\n\n**Alternative Archives:**\n- **NOMADS:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/hrrr/prod/`\n- **University of Utah CHPC:** `https://home.chpc.utah.edu/~u0553130/Brian_Blaylock/cgi-bin/hrrr_download.cgi`\n- **NCEP Products:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/hrrr/`\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 3 km (Grid #184)\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n- Central Latitude: 38.5°N\n- Central Longitude: 97.5°W (262.5°W)\n- Update Frequency: Hourly (00z-23z)\n- Forecast Hours: 0-18h (standard), 0-48h (extended: 00,06,12,18z)\n- DRT=3 Status: ✅ VERIFIED (~82-100% of messages use complex packing)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [NOAA HRRR Official Page](https://rapidrefresh.noaa.gov/hrrr/)\n- [AWS HRRR Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-hrrr-pds/)\n- [NCEP HRRR Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/hrrr/)\n\n---\n\n## 2. NAM CONUS (North American Mesoscale)\n\n### Primary Archive: AWS Open Data Registry\n\n**Base URL:** `https://noaa-nam-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n\n**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-nam-pds/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n\n**Directory Structure:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-nam-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD_HH/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date (e.g., `20260703`)\n- **HH** = Cycle hour (00, 06, 12, 18)\n\n**File Naming Convention:**\n- AWIP physics: `nam.tCCz.awphys00.tm00.grib2`\n- CONUS nest: `nam.tCCz.conusnest.hiresffh.tm00.grib2`\n\nWhere CC = cycle hour (00, 06, 12, 18), ffh = forecast hour (00-60)\n\n**Example URLs:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-nam-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703_00/nam.t00z.awphys00.tm00.grib2\nhttps://noaa-nam-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703_12/nam.t12z.awphys12.tm00.grib2\n```\n\n**Alternative Archives:**\n- **NOMADS:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/nam/prod/`\n- **READY Archives:** `https://www.ready.noaa.gov/archives.php`\n- **NCEP Products:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/nam/`\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 12 km (Grid #218 - primary)\n- Alternative Grids: Grid #197 (5 km), Grid #184 (2.5 km), Grid #91 (3 km AK)\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n- Update Frequency: 4x daily (00, 06, 12, 18z)\n- Forecast Hours: 0-60 hours\n- Products: awphys (AWIP physics), multiple regional grids\n- DRT=3 Status: ✅ VERIFIED (100% of awphys messages use complex packing)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [AWS NAM Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-nam/)\n- [READY NAM Documentation](https://www.ready.noaa.gov/READYmetdata.php)\n- [NCEP NAM Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/nam/)\n\n---\n\n## 3. NDFD / NBM (National Digital Forecast Database / National Blend of Models)\n\n### Primary Archive: NOAA FTP/HTTP Server\n\n**FTP URL:** `ftp://tgftp.nws.noaa.gov/SL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/`\n\n**HTTP URL:** `https://tgftp.nws.noaa.gov/SL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** NOAA FTP Server (tgftp.nws.noaa.gov)\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (anonymous FTP, no authentication required)\n\n**Directory Structure Path Components:**\n```\nSL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **SL.us008001** = Station/location identifier\n- **ST.opnl** = Open/operational status\n- **DF.gr2** = Data format (GRIB2)\n- **DC.ndfd** = Data content (NDFD)\n\n**Example URLs:**\n```\nhttps://tgftp.nws.noaa.gov/SL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/CONUS/\nhttps://tgftp.nws.noaa.gov/SL.us008001/ST.opnl/DF.gr2/DC.ndfd/PRICO/\n```\n\n### Alternative Archive: AWS Open Data Registry (NBM)\n\n**Base URL:** `https://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n\n**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n\n**Directory Structure:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/blend.YYYYMMDD/HH/core/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date\n- **HH** = Cycle hour (00, 06, 12, 18)\n\n**File Naming Convention:**\n```\nblend.tHHz.core.fFFF.co.grib2\n```\n\nWhere HH = cycle hour, FFF = forecast hour (001, 002, etc.)\n\n**Example URLs:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/blend.20260703/00/core/blend.t00z.core.f001.co.grib2\nhttps://noaa-nbm-grib2-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/blend.20260703/12/core/blend.t12z.core.f012.co.grib2\n```\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 2.5 km (CONUS - Grid #184), 5 km (Grid #197), 3 km (various)\n- Coverage: CONUS, Puerto Rico, Hawaii, Guam, Alaska\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n- Update Frequency: Multiple daily updates\n- DRT=3 Status: ✅ DOCUMENTED (explicitly states use of complex packing DRT 5.2/5.3)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [NDFD GRIB2 Design](https://graphical.weather.gov/docs/grib_design.html)\n- [NBM v4.0 Documentation](https://vlab.noaa.gov/web/mdl/nbm-grib2-v4.0)\n- [AWS NBM Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-nbm/)\n\n---\n\n## 4. RAP (Rapid Refresh)\n\n### Primary Archive: AWS Open Data Registry\n\n**Base URL:** `https://noaa-rap-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n\n**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-rap-pds/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n\n**Directory Structure:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-rap-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD/HH/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date (e.g., `20260703`)\n- **HH** = Cycle hour (00-23, hourly)\n\n**File Naming Convention:**\n- 13km pressure levels: `rap.tCCz.awp130pgrbfxx.grib2`\n- 20km pressure levels: `rap.tCCz.awp252pgrbfxx.grib2`\n- 40km pressure levels: `rap.tCCz.awp236pgrbfxx.grib2`\n\nWhere CC = cycle hour (00-23), xx = forecast hour\n\n**Example URLs:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-rap-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/00/rap.t00z.awp130pgrbf00.grib2\nhttps://noaa-rap-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/12/rap.t12z.awp130pgrbf12.grib2\n```\n\n**Alternative Archives:**\n- **NOMADS:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/rap/prod/`\n- **NCEP Products:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/rap/`\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 13 km (Grid #130 - primary)\n- Alternative Grids: Grid #236 (40 km), Grid #200 (Puerto Rico 16 km)\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n- Update Frequency: Hourly (00z-23z)\n- Forecast Hours: 0-21h (standard), 0-51h (extended: 03,09,15,21z)\n- DRT=3 Status: LIKELY (documented complex packing, requires file verification)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [AWS RAP Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-rap/)\n- [NCEP RAP Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/rap/)\n- [Herbie RAP Documentation](https://herbie.readthedocs.io/)\n\n---\n\n## 5. RRFS (Rapid Refresh Forecast System)\n\n### Primary Archive: AWS Open Data Registry\n\n**Base URL:** `https://noaa-rrfs-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n\n**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-rrfs-pds/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n\n**Status:** BETA/Prototype (scheduled operational ~August 2026)\n\n**Directory Structure:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-rrfs-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD/HH/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date (e.g., `20260703`)\n- **HH** = Cycle hour (00-23, hourly)\n\n**Example URLs:**\n```\nhttps://noaa-rrfs-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/00/\nhttps://noaa-rrfs-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/20260703/06/\n```\n\n**Alternative Archives:**\n- **NOMADS:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/rrfs/prod/` (Available July 2026 onwards)\n- **GribStream:** `https://gribstream.com/models/rrfsprslev`\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 3 km (1799 x 1059 grid)\n- Coverage: CONUS\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal CONUS\n- Update Frequency: Hourly: 0-18h; Extended (00,06,12,18z): 0-84h\n- Status: Next-generation model to replace NAM, HiResW, HREF, NARRE\n- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (model in development, not yet verified)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [NOAA GSL RRFS Page](https://gsl.noaa.gov/rrfs/)\n- [AWS RRFS Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-rrfs/)\n- [NCEP RRFS Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/rrfs/)\n\n---\n\n## 6. HREF (High-Resolution Ensemble Forecast)\n\n### Primary Archive: NOMADS\n\n**Base URL:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** NOMADS (NOAA Operational Model Archive and Distribution System)\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n\n**Access Methods:**\n- HTTPS direct download\n- THREDDS Data Server\n- OPeNDAP protocol\n- GRIB filter for data subsetting\n\n**Directory Structure (NOMADS):**\n```\nhttps://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/href/prod/href.YYYYMMDD/HH/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date\n- **HH** = Cycle hour (typically 00, 06, 12, 18 for ensemble runs)\n\n**Alternative Resources:**\n- **SPC HREF Viewer:** `https://www.spc.noaa.gov/exper/href/`\n- **Herbie Documentation:** `https://herbie.readthedocs.io/en/stable/gallery/noaa_models/href.html`\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 5 km (approximately)\n- Coverage: CONUS, Alaska, Hawaii\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30 - assumed for regional ensemble)\n- Update Frequency: 2x daily (approximately)\n- Status: Convection-allowing model (CAM) ensemble\n- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (requires file verification)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [SPC HREF Ensemble Viewer](https://www.spc.noaa.gov/exper/href/)\n- [Herbie HREF Documentation](https://herbie.readthedocs.io/en/stable/gallery/noaa_models/href.html)\n\n---\n\n## 7. SREF (Short Range Ensemble Forecast)\n\n### Primary Archive: NOMADS\n\n**Base URL:** `https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** NOMADS (NOAA Operational Model Archive and Distribution System)\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n\n**Directory Structure (NOMADS):**\n```\nhttps://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/sref/prod/sref.YYYYMMDD/HH/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **YYYYMMDD** = Model run date\n- **HH** = Cycle hour (03, 09, 15, 21 - 4x daily)\n\n**Alternative Resources:**\n- **NCEP SREF Products:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/sref/`\n\n**Important Status Notice:**\n⚠️ **As of July 25, 2025, NOAA/NWS has issued a proposal to terminate the SREF system, with GEFS (Global Ensemble Forecast System) suggested as the replacement. This may affect future data availability.**\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 32-45 km (regional)\n- Coverage: CONUS, Alaska\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30 - assumed)\n- Update Frequency: 4x daily (03, 09, 15, 21z)\n- Ensemble Size: 21 members covering North America (US, Canada, Mexico, Eastern Pacific, Western Atlantic)\n- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (requires file verification)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [NOMADS Portal](https://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/)\n- [NCEP SREF Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/sref/)\n\n---\n\n## 8. RTMA / URMA (Real-Time / Unrestricted Mesoscale Analysis)\n\n### Primary Archive: AWS Open Data Registry\n\n**Base URL:** `https://noaa-rtma-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/`\n\n**S3 Bucket:** `s3://noaa-rtma-pds/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** Amazon Web Services (AWS) - NOAA Open Data Program\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (no authentication required)\n\n**Directory Structure (AWS):**\n```\nhttps://noaa-rtma-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD/HH/\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **YYYYMMDD** = Analysis date\n- **HH** = Analysis hour (00-23, hourly for RTMA)\n\n**Alternative Resources:**\n- **GribStream API:** `https://gribstream.com/models/rtma`\n- **NOMADS:** Available through NOMADS data servers\n- **Google Earth Engine:** RTMA dataset available (hourly analyses at 2.5 km)\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 2.5 km (CONUS, Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico)\n- Coverage: CONUS, Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n- Update Frequency: Hourly (RTMA), less frequent for URMA\n- Status: RTMA analyses produced hourly; RTMA-RU produces analyses every 15 minutes for aviation\n- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (requires file verification)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [AWS RTMA Registry](https://registry.opendata.aws/noaa-rtma/)\n- [NOAA VLab RTMA/URMA Community](https://vlab.noaa.gov)\n- [GribStream RTMA](https://gribstream.com/models/rtma)\n\n---\n\n## 9. HiResW (High-Resolution Window)\n\n### Primary Archive: NCEP Central Operations\n\n**Base URL:** `https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/hiresw/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** NOAA NCEP Central Operations (NCO)\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (HTTPS direct download)\n\n**File Naming Convention:**\n```\nhiresw.tCCz.fv3_2p5km.fFF.hi.grib2\n```\n\nWhere:\n- **CC** = Cycle hour\n- **FF** = Forecast hour\n\n**Directory Structure (NCEP):**\n```\nhttps://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/hiresw/YYYYMMDD/YYYYMMDD_HH/\n```\n\n**Important Notes:**\n- **Archive Period:** Limited (not indefinite retention)\n- **Download Limits:** Applies to NCEP model data sources\n- **Historical Data:** May require special requests to NOAA NCEP\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 5 km (varies by window)\n- Coverage: Eastern/Western US, Alaska\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30)\n- Update Frequency: 4x daily (00, 06, 12, 18z)\n- Status: High-resolution window forecasts\n- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (requires file verification)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [NCEP HiResW Products](https://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/hiresw/)\n- Last updated: May 11, 2021\n\n---\n\n## 10. WAVEWATCH3 (Great Lakes Wave Model)\n\n### Primary Archive: NOAA/NCEP Marine Modeling Branch FTP\n\n**Main Download Page:** `https://polar.ncep.noaa.gov/waves/download.shtml`\n\n**Alternative Download Page:** `https://polar.ncep.noaa.gov/waves/download2.shtml`\n\n**FTP Server:** `ftp://polar.ncep.noaa.gov/waves/`\n\n**Hosting Platform:** NOAA/NCEP Marine Modeling and Analyses Branch\n\n**Accessibility:** ✅ Public (FTP and HTTPS)\n\n**Data Types Available:**\n- Wave spectral data summaries\n- Detailed spectra\n- Various wave parameters\n\n**Alternative Resources:**\n- **UCAR DASH Dataset:** `https://data.ucar.edu/dataset/noaa-wave-watch-iii-ww3-model-output`\n- **Great Lakes Portal:** `https://www.weather.gov/greatlakes/`\n- **LuckGrib:** `https://luckgrib.com/models/ww3_gl/` (third-party tool)\n\n**Model Specifications:**\n- Resolution: 2.5 km (Great Lakes)\n- Coverage: Great Lakes\n- Projection: Lambert Conformal Conic (GDT 3.30 - Great Lakes grid)\n- Update Frequency: Every 6 hours\n- Data Format: GRIB2\n- DRT=3 Status: UNKNOWN (requires file verification)\n\n**Sources:**\n- [NOAA WAVEWATCH III Download](https://polar.ncep.noaa.gov/waves/download.shtml)\n- [UCAR WAVEWATCH III Dataset](https://data.ucar.edu/dataset/noaa-wave-watch-iii-ww3-model-output)\n\n---\n\n## Archive Platform URL Pattern Summary\n\n### AWS S3 Pattern (Most Common)\n```\nhttps://noaa-[model]-pds.s3.amazonaws.com/YYYYMMDD/HH/[filename]\n```\nUsed by: HRRR, NAM, RAP, RRFS, RTMA, NBM\n\n### NOMADS Pattern\n```\nhttps://nomads.ncep.noaa.gov/pub/data/nccf/com/[model]/prod/[model].YYYYMMDD/HH/\n```\nUsed by: HREF, SREF, NAM, RAP, HRRR (redirect)\n\n### NCEP Products Pattern\n```\nhttps://www.nco.ncep.noaa.gov/pmb/products/[model]/YYYYMMDD/YYYYMMDD_HH/\n```\nUsed by: HiResW\n\n### NOAA FTP Pattern\n```\nftp://[server].noaa.gov/[path]/[model]/\n```\nUsed by: NDFD, WAVEWATCH3\n\n---\n\n## DRT=3 Verification Status Summary\n\n| Model | Verification Status | Source |\n|-------|-------------------|--------|\n| **HRRR** | ✅ VERIFIED (~82-100% DRT=3) | File Alternative to wgrib2 (wgrib2 not available via apt, compilation failed on Debian Trixie)\n- Eccodes provides equivalent functionality for inspecting GRIB2 templates\n\n### Inspection Process\n```python\nimport eccodes\n\nwith open('file.grib2', 'rb') as f:\n    while True:\n        msg_id = eccodes.codes_grib_new_from_file(f)\n        if msg_id is None:\n            break\n\n        gdt = eccodes.codes_get(msg_id, 'gridDefinitionTemplateNumber')\n        drt = eccodes.codes_get(msg_id, 'dataRepresentationTemplateNumber')\n        grid_type = eccodes.codes_get(msg_id, 'gridType')\n        # ... additional parameter inspection\n\n        eccodes.codes_release(msg_id)\n```\n\n### Key Parameters Inspected\n- `gridDefinitionTemplateNumber`: 30 = GDT 3.30 (Lambert Conformal Conic)\n- `dataRepresentationTemplateNumber`: 3 = DRT=3 (Complex packing with spatial differencing)\n- `gridType`: Projection type (e.g., \"lambert\")\n- `Nx`, `Ny`: Grid dimensions\n- `paramId`: GRIB parameter code\n- `name`: Parameter name\n\n---\n\n## Key Findings\n\n### ✅ Successful Verifications\n\n1. **HRRR CONUS:** 170/170 messages confirmed with GDT 3.30, 139/170 (81.8%)
